text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Guess what, Trainer? An older student
complimented me on my running the other day!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
She said that having a younger student like me
around nipping at her heels is motivating her to
focus and work harder!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Maybe that means I'm slowly edging towards
being the top Umamusume in all of Japan! Hehe,
but who knows for sure, right? ♪

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ever since I met you, I've grown to love running
even more!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Here's to even more years together, Trainer!
